mapper.sql: id, user_id, dept_id, committee, position, year, start_date, end_date, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, sys_no, branch, res_audit, res_desc, audit_user_id, audit_date, committee_type, biz_type, committee_branch, committee_sub_branch, parttime_type, state, parttime_apply
mapper.select: select sapi.id as rowId , puser.id as "userId.id",puser.name as "userId.name", puser.name as userName, csci.code as "committee.id",csci.name as "committee.name",csci.name as committeeName,sapi.branch as branch, csy.code as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name",csy.name as yearName,sdept.id as "deptId.id",sdept.name as "deptId.name", cspj.code as "position.id",cspj.name as "position.name",cspj.name as positionName, cspt.code as "parttimeType.id",cspt.name as "parttimeType.name",cspt.name as parttimeTypeName,sapi.parttime_apply as parttimeApply, sapi.start_date as startDate,sapi.end_date as endDate,sapi.data_status as dataStatus from srm_ac_parttime_info sapi left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=sapi.user_id left join ct_srm_committee_info csci on csci.code=sapi.committee left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sapi.year left join ct_srm_parttime_job cspj on cspj.code=sapi.position left join ct_srm_parttime_type cspt on cspt.code=sapi.parttime_type left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sapi.dept_id where sapi.id=#{rowId}
